mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room ( room_id, place_id, room_name, roombasecount, max_capacity, room_count, amount, roomintro, rf_id, is_active ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{placeId}, #{roomName}, #{roombasecount}, #{maxCapacity}, #{roomCount}, #{amount}, #{roomintro}, #{rfId}, NVL(#{isActive}, 1) )
mapper.select: SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.place_id AS placeId, r.room_name AS roomName, r.roombasecount AS roombasecount, r.max_capacity AS maxCapacity, r.room_count AS roomCount, r.amount AS amount, r.roomintro AS roomintro FROM room r JOIN place pl ON r.place_id = pl.place_id JOIN partner p ON pl.partner_id = p.partner_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.room_id DESC

SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.place_id AS placeId, r.room_name AS roomName, r.roombasecount AS roombasecount, r.max_capacity AS maxCapacity, r.room_count AS roomCount, r.amount AS amount, r.roomintro AS roomintro, r.is_active AS isActive, (SELECT image_url FROM room_image ri WHERE ri.room_id = r.room_id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS imageUrl FROM room r WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY r.room_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_facility ( rf_id, roomaircondition, roomtv, roominternet, roombath, roomrefrigerator ) VALUES ( #{rfId}, NVL(#{roomaircondition}, 0), NVL(#{roomtv}, 0), NVL(#{roominternet}, 0), NVL(#{roombath}, 0), NVL(#{roomrefrigerator}, 0) )
mapper.select: SELECT rf_id FROM room WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.update: UPDATE room_facility SET roomaircondition = NVL(#{roomaircondition}, 0), roomtv = NVL(#{roomtv}, 0), roominternet = NVL(#{roominternet}, 0), roombath = NVL(#{roombath}, 0), roomrefrigerator = NVL(#{roomrefrigerator}, 0) WHERE rf_id = #{rfId}

UPDATE room SET room_name = #{roomName}, roombasecount = #{roombasecount}, max_capacity = #{maxCapacity}, room_count = #{roomCount}, amount = #{amount}, roomintro = #{roomintro}, is_active = NVL(#{isActive}, 1) WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.RESERVATION_ID, r.STATUS, m.USERNAME as MEMBER_NAME, rm.ROOM_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as CHECK_IN, TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as CHECK_OUT, r.AMOUNT, r.GUEST_COUNT, TO_CHAR(r.REQUEST) AS REQUEST FROM RESERVATION r LEFT JOIN MEMBER1 m ON r.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ROOM rm ON r.ROOM_ID = rm.ROOM_ID WHERE rm.PLACE_ID = #{placeId} AND r.STATUS IN ('SUCCESS', 'CANCELED') AND r.CHECK_OUT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{start}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND r.CHECK_IN_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{end}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_usage SET status = 'CANCELED', cancelled_at = SYSDATE, cancel_reason = '파트너 오버부킹 강제 취소' WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND member_coupon_id = #{memberCouponId}
